page.title: Mariah SX21: Best Boat in Marbella for Quick 2-hour sunset zip

data.meta_description: Discover the Mariah SX21, the best boat in Marbella for a quick 2-hour sunset zip. 5 pax, 6.4m, departs Puerto Banús. Book your sunset adventure today.
data.summary: The Mariah SX21 is the ideal choice for a fast, intimate sunset cruise from Puerto Banús. With capacity for 5 guests, it offers a budget-friendly way to enjoy Marbella's coastline in just 2 hours.
key_facts: Length: 6.4 metres, ideal for quick trips
Includes licensed skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks

faq.a: The Mariah SX21 accommodates up to 5 passengers, making it perfect for small groups, couples, or families looking for an intimate sunset experience on the water.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs.

faq.q: Where does the Mariah SX21 depart from?
faq.a: The Mariah SX21 departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's glamorous marina. You can easily meet the boat there, and we'll coordinate exact timing via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I book the Mariah SX21 for longer than 2 hours?
faq.a: Yes, longer charters are available on request. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss half-day or full-day options, though the 2-hour sunset zip is the most popular choice for this boat.

faq.q: Is the Mariah SX21 suitable for children?
faq.a: Absolutely. The boat is safe and stable, and the skipper ensures a family-friendly environment. Children are welcome, and life jackets are provided for all ages.

faq.q: What is the best time for a sunset zip?
faq.a: The ideal time is about 1.5 to 2 hours before sunset, typically between 18:00 and 20:00 depending on the season. This gives you the best light and a stunning view of the sun dipping behind La Concha mountain.

faq.q: Do I need a boating license to charter the Mariah SX21?
faq.a: No. All our charters include a licensed skipper who handles navigation and safety. You just relax and enjoy the ride.

faq.q: How do I book the Mariah SX21?
faq.a: Booking is easy via WhatsApp. Send us a message with your preferred date, time, and number of guests, and we'll confirm availability and send pricing details.

data.body_html:
Looking for the best boat in Marbella for a quick, unforgettable sunset zip? The Mariah SX21 is your answer. At just 6.4 metres long and accommodating up to 5 passengers, this nimble speedboat is purpose-built for short, scenic cruises from Puerto Banús. Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or simply want to catch the golden hour over the Mediterranean, the Mariah SX21 delivers a premium experience without the premium price tag. Read on to discover why this is the Mariah SX21 best for a 2-hour sunset adventure.

Why the Mariah SX21 Is Perfect for a Sunset Zip

The Mariah SX21 is not about luxury lounging—it's about speed, agility, and getting you to the best sunset views in minutes. With a powerful outboard engine, it zips across the water from Puerto Banús towards Marbella's coastline, offering a thrilling ride that larger yachts simply can't match. In just 2 hours, you can cruise past the Golden Mile, catch glimpses of La Concha mountain, and anchor near a quiet cove like Cala del Faro to watch the sun set. It's ideal for couples, small families, or a group of friends who want a quick escape from the marina's buzz.

Key Specs at a Glance

SpecificationDetails
Length6.4 metres
Capacity5 passengers
Departure pointPuerto Banús
Typical charter duration2 hours (sunset zip)
InclusionsSkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, IVA
PricingOn request via WhatsApp

What's Included in Your Charter

Every charter on the Mariah SX21 comes with everything you need for a hassle-free experience. Our licensed skipper handles all navigation and safety, so you can focus on the views. Onboard, you'll enjoy:

  • Unlimited water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks to keep you refreshed
  • Full insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) already included in the price

No hidden fees, no surprises. Just show up at Puerto Banús and let us take care of the rest.

Best Routes for a 2-Hour Sunset Cruise

From Puerto Banús, your skipper will typically head east towards Marbella's coastline. You'll pass the iconic Golden Mile with its luxury villas and hotels, then continue to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés—small, sheltered coves perfect for dropping anchor. As the sun sinks behind La Concha mountain, the sky turns shades of orange and pink, creating a picture-perfect moment. If you prefer a quieter route, the boat can also zip west towards Estepona, offering views of the Sierra Bermeja mountains. Either way, you'll return to Puerto Banús as the marina lights begin to twinkle.

Who Should Charter the Mariah SX21?

This boat is Mariah SX21 best for small groups who value speed and intimacy. It's an excellent choice for:

  • Couples looking for a romantic sunset date
  • Small families with children who want a safe, fun ride
  • Groups of friends celebrating a birthday or anniversary
  • Photographers or influencers wanting unique sunset shots
  • Anyone short on time but eager for a quality on-water experience

If your party is larger than 5, consider our other boats like the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, which accommodate up to 11 guests.

How to Book

Booking the Mariah SX21 is straightforward. Simply send us a message via WhatsApp with your preferred date, time, and number of guests. We'll confirm availability and send you pricing details (which vary by season and demand). For the best sunset light, aim for a departure 1.5 to 2 hours before sunset—typically between 18:00 and 20:00 in summer. Don't wait until the last minute; sunset slots are popular and book up quickly.

Why Rent from Boat Rental Marbella?

We are a local operator based in Puerto Banús with a diverse fleet of over 15 boats, from speedboats to superyachts. Every charter includes a professional skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks—all taxes included. No hidden fees, no upsells. Our team knows the coast intimately and will tailor your route to your preferences. For a quick, affordable sunset zip, the Mariah SX21 is simply the best in class. Browse our full fleet to compare options, or contact us directly to secure your slot.

Frequently asked questions

How many people can the Mariah SX21 hold?

The Mariah SX21 accommodates up to 5 passengers, making it perfect for small groups, couples, or families looking for an intimate sunset experience on the water.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs.

Where does the Mariah SX21 depart from?

The Mariah SX21 departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's glamorous marina. You can easily meet the boat there, and we'll coordinate exact timing via WhatsApp.

Can I book the Mariah SX21 for longer than 2 hours?

Yes, longer charters are available on request. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss half-day or full-day options, though the 2-hour sunset zip is the most popular choice for this boat.

Is the Mariah SX21 suitable for children?

Absolutely. The boat is safe and stable, and the skipper ensures a family-friendly environment. Children are welcome, and life jackets are provided for all ages.

What is the best time for a sunset zip?

The ideal time is about 1.5 to 2 hours before sunset, typically between 18:00 and 20:00 depending on the season. This gives you the best light and a stunning view of the sun dipping behind La Concha mountain.

Do I need a boating license to charter the Mariah SX21?

No. All our charters include a licensed skipper who handles navigation and safety. You just relax and enjoy the ride.

How do I book the Mariah SX21?

Booking is easy via WhatsApp. Send us a message with your preferred date, time, and number of guests, and we'll confirm availability and send pricing details.
